categories.label: AI & Machine Learning
categories.description: Artificial intelligence, machine learning, large language models, AI products, research, and policy

categories.label: Geopolitics
categories.description: International conflicts, diplomacy, sanctions, military deployments, great power competition, treaties

categories.label: Markets & Economy
categories.description: Macro-level financial news: stock indices, bond yields, forex, commodity prices, Fed/central bank policy, inflation data, jobs reports, GDP. Focus on PRICES, RATES, and MACRO indicators — not individual company news.

categories.label: Technology
categories.description: Big tech companies, software platforms, hardware, consumer tech, enterprise technology news

categories.label: Energy & Commodities
categories.description: Oil, gas, renewables, commodity prices, energy policy, pipelines, and infrastructure

categories.label: Cybersecurity
categories.description: Data breaches, ransomware, vulnerabilities, security policy, nation-state attacks, zero-days

categories.label: Startups & Venture
categories.description: Funding rounds, IPOs, acquisitions, valuations, founder news, VC fund launches, startup failures/pivots. Must involve a company founded within the last ~15 years or a named VC fund. Exclude general small business, retail trends, or cultural stories.

categories.label: Science & Research
categories.description: Scientific discoveries, research breakthroughs, space exploration, climate science, medicine

categories.label: Defense & Policy
categories.description: Military spending, weapons development, defense contracts, national security policy, intelligence

categories.label: Business & Finance
categories.description: Company-specific news: corporate earnings results, M&A deals, executive appointments/departures, company strategy, major layoffs, supply chain disruptions. Exclude macro economic data, index movements, and Fed policy — those belong in Markets.

categories.label: Climate & Environment
categories.description: Climate policy, extreme weather events, sustainability initiatives, environmental regulation

categories.label: Healthcare
categories.description: Drug approvals, health policy, medical research, biotech, public health, insurance
